meaning: n.缩排,呈锯齿状,缺口,印凹痕
examples: The indentation gives you a visual cue as to which lines are related to each other.
Indentation or Space After a Paragraph?
The unit of indentation is four Spaces.
It was filled with a waxlike substance, the middle of which had a round indentation, in the shape of a small ball.
In particular one part of it - calcium silicate hydrate - refused all attempts to be analysed under an electron microscope or by nano-indentation.
